zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton於1599年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾布爾巴。她於從1620年到1622年與Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年12月22日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾哈德利，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton于1599年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾布爾巴。她于从1620年到1622年与Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年12月22日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾哈德利，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Cotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called from Old English (æt) cotum (dative plural of cot) ‘at the cottages or huts’ (or sometimes possibly from a Middle English plural, coten). Examples include Coton (Cambridgeshire, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire), Cottam (East Yorkshire, Lancashire, Nottinghamshire), and Cotham (Nottinghamshire). Particularly common in Staffordshire.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ), derived via Nicot, or of the personal name Jacques , derived via Jacot.
History: John Cotton (1584–1652) was a noted Puritan preacher, who landed at Boston, MA, from London in 1633 and became leader of the Congregationalists in America.

variants.name: Cotten
meanings: Altered form of German Kotten, a habitational name from any of several places so named in Rhineland, Westphalia, Silesia, etc., or perhaps an American shortened form of composite German surnames such as Kottenhagen, Kottenhoff, Kottenkamp (see Koth ).

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

variants.name: Cotham
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Cotton  .

variants.name: Cottam
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): variant of   Cotton  .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton was born in 1599, in Burbage, Leicestershire, England. She married Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield from 1620 to 1622, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died before 22 December 1694, in Hadley, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton est née en 1599, à Burbage, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield du 1620 au 1622, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée avant 22 décembre 1694, à Hadley, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton wurde 1599 in Burbage, Leicestershire, England geboren. Sie hat von 1620 bis 1622 in England Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor 22. Dezember 1694 in Hadley, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton è nata il nel 1599 nel Burbage, Leicestershire, England. Lei sposato Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield da 1620 a 1622, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 22 dicembre 1694, nel Hadley, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cottonは1599年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルバッジで生まれた。から1620年まで1622年にイギリスでRev. Henry Smith of Wethersfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年12月22日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアハドリーで死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton(은)는 1599년 영국 레이스스터실르 버바지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1620년 부터 1622년 까지 영국에서 Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 12월 22일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 하들리에서 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton nasceu em 1599, em Burbage, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield de 1620 a 1622, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 22 de dezembro de 1694, em Hadley, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton родилась в 1599 г. в местности бурбадж, лисестиршир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield с 1620 по 1622 в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед 22 декабрь 1694 г. в местности хадли, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Dorothy Cotton nació en 1599, en Burbage, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Rev. Henry Smith of Wethersfield desde 1620 hasta 1622, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 22 de diciembre de 1694, en Hadley, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
